## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Build, config, or tooling change
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change
- [ ] ⚠️ **Breaking change** — Existing functionality affected

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (PSR-12, PHPDoc comments)
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] Commented complex or non-obvious logic
- [ ] Added / updated tests (Pest PHP)
- [ ] `php artisan test` passes locally
- [ ] `php artisan migrate:fresh --seed` runs without errors
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
- [ ] `composer audit` shows no critical vulnerabilities
